title: Colorful Eyeblossoms
description: Adds eyeblossom variants that naturally appear to the rest of the 15 dyes!
body:
### --{ Adds eyeblossom variants that naturally appear to the rest of the 15 dyes! }--
    When an eyeblossom opens there is a 15% chance it'll be have a colorful variant. The default 85% is orange, and the other 15 are randomly chosen out of the 15%. This likely will be configurable in the future.

### --{ NOTE }--
    This is a very small mod I wrote since it seemed fun so it likely won't be super high on my priority list.
